prompt: Create a new page at /about titled About with a Hero block introducing our team.
On /pricing, add a CTA block at the bottom with title 'Start today', description 'No credit card required', ctaText 'Get started', ctaHref '/signup'.
On /, update the hero heading to 'Build and ship faster' and subheading to 'Edit your site in minutes with AI assistance'.
On /, move the CTA block to the top of the page above the hero.
Duplicate the FAQ block on /pricing and place the copy after the original.
On /pricing in the FAQAccordion block, add a new FAQ item with q 'Do you offer discounts?' and a 'Yes, annual plans include a discount.' at the end of the list.
On /pricing in the FAQAccordion block, update item 0 so the answer says 'Email support is available Monday through Friday.'
On /pricing in the FAQAccordion block, remove item index 1 from the FAQ list.
On /pricing in the FAQAccordion block, move FAQ item index 2 to the top of the list.
Rename page /pricing to /plans and change its title to Plans.
In navigation, move /pricing so it appears before /.
Duplicate page /pricing to a new page /pricing-copy titled Pricing Copy and place it after /pricing in navigation.
